content.content:
I found the event. Details:

- Title: Dinner with Blue Sparrow Tech  
- Date/time: 2024-05-24, 19:00–21:00  
- Location (calendar field): The Gourmet Restaurant  
- Status: confirmed

The calendar entry does not include a street address — only the venue name. The event description does reference an email from lily.white@gmail.com, which may be the organizer/contact.

What would you like me to do next?
- I can email lily.white@gmail.com (or another participant) to ask for the venue address and add it to the event — tell me which email to contact and confirm you want me to send it.  
- I can draft the message for you to review/send.  
- Or, if you prefer, tell me the address and I’ll add it to the event.
